# Supplemental Target Information Table
# File Time Stamp: 2025-04-04T09:03:11
# This file provides information about the targets that were
#    searched as part of the TESS multi-sector search.
#    Not all targets with target pixel files are searched.
#    A target not appearing in this file implies that it was not searched.
# The data are in a white space delimited format
# FORMAT: %16d %s %1d %1d
# COLUMNS:
# 1 TIC ID [int] - Target Identifier
# 2 Data Searched Per Sector [string] - Sectors with data included in the search.
#           Each character in the string indicates whether the target has data
#           for the sector (1=Yes ; 0=No).
#           The left-most character in the string
#           corresponds to the target having data in minSector
#            (minSector is defined in the header below).  For instance,
#            if minSector=1, the string '011' indicates that
#            data for Sectors 2 and 3 were included in the search
#            for this target.
# 3 Made TCE [int] - Target made a TCE (1=Yes; 0=No)
# 4 Target Completed DV [int] - Target successfully completed Data Validation
#            (1=Yes ; 0=No).
# PARAMETERS:
# minSector: 14 - First sector number corresponding to first (left-most) char. in Col. 2
# maxSector: 86 - Last sector number corresponding to last (right-most) char. in Col. 2
